pinterest.text: Most 6-year-olds take 4 tries to trace this path correctly. Every wrong turn is a micro-decision, building spatial reasoning without feeling like homework. Save this for Saturday morning, more puzzles like this in JoyMaze — free on iOS & Android.

instagram.text:
You hand this to your kid. Don't say a word. See what happens.
Eyes narrow. Pencil slows. Then — the sound of it stopping. They got it.
That frustration before the breakthrough — that's the skill. Not the finished maze.
How fast did yours solve it? Drop the time below.
